title: Google Visitor Experience - All You SHOULD Know Before Going ...
content: Things to Do in Mountain View. See all things to do. # Google Visitor Experience. Tripadvisor gives a Travelers’ Choice award to accommodations, attractions and restaurants that consistently earn great reviews from travelers and are ranked within the top 10% of properties on Tripadvisor. This visitation center has a large park where there is a work of art called Halo, is colored glazed, then the parking lot of bicycles of typical colors of the brand, with the signage that are exclusive use of employees and then a building that on one side has the shop where all Google products are exhibited and on the other a space to eat and drink.
